name: shifter
description: Emitter sweeps its firing direction each loop iteration while every fired bullet also kinks mid-flight via its own sub-script

sweepAngle.description: Degrees the emitter's firing direction advances each loop iteration

loopDelay.description: Frames between loop iterations (i.e. between shots)

shiftDelay.description: Frames after a bullet's own spawn before it kinks

shiftAngle.description: Direction change each bullet applies to itself at shiftDelay
